sentences.arabic: يَقُولُ الْإِمَامُ ابْنُ الْقَيِّمِ فِي كِتَابِهِ «الْوَابِلُ الصَّيِّبُ» إِنَّ فِي الذِّكْرِ أَكْثَرَ مِنْ مِائَةِ فَائِدَةٍ تَعُودُ عَلَى الْمُسْلِمِ فِي حَيَاتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Imam Ibn el-Kajjim navodi u svojoj knjizi 'El-Vabilus-Sajib' da u zikru (spominjanju Allaha) postoji više od stotinu koristi koje se vraćaju muslimanu u njegovom životu.
sentences.translationEn: Imam Ibn al-Qayyim states in his book 'Al-Wabil al-Sayyib' that there are more than a hundred benefits of Dhikr (remembrance of Allah) for a Muslim in their life.

sentences.arabic: فَالذِّكْرُ يَطْرُدُ الشَّيْطَانَ، وَيُرْضِي الرَّحْمَنَ، وَيُزِيلُ الْهَمَّ وَالْغَمَّ عَنِ الْقَلْبِ الْمُتْعَبِ.
sentences.translation: Zikr tjera šejtana, izaziva zadovoljstvo Milostivog i uklanja brigu i tugu iz umornog srca.
sentences.translationEn: Dhikr drives away Satan, pleases the Most Merciful, and removes worry and grief from the weary heart.

sentences.arabic: وَقَدْ ثَبَتَ فِي الصَّحِيحِ عَنِ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ أَنَّهُ قَالَ: «مَثَلُ الَّذِي يَذْكُرُ رَبَّهُ وَالَّذِي لَا يَذْكُرُ رَبَّهُ، مَثَلُ الْحَيِّ وَالْمَيِّتِ» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ الدَّعَوَاتِ، رَقْمُ ٦٤٠٧].
sentences.translation: U vjerodostojnom hadisu se prenosi od Poslanika, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, da je rekao: 'Primjer onoga koji spominje svoga Gospodara i onoga koji Ga ne spominje je kao primjer živog i mrtvog' [Bilježi Buhari u Knjizi o dovama, br. 6407].
sentences.translationEn: It is established in the authentic collection from the Prophet (PBUH) that he said: 'The likeness of the one who remembers his Lord and the one who does not remember his Lord is like the likeness of the living and the dead' [Narrated by al-Bukhari in the Book of Supplications, No. 6407].

sentences.arabic: يُوَضِّحُ هَذَا الْكَلَامُ أَنَّ حَيَاةَ الْقَلْبِ الْحَقِيقِيَّةَ لَا تَكُونُ إِلَّا بِدَوَامِ الِاتِّصَالِ بِاللهِ تَعَالَى وَذِكْرِهِ.
sentences.translation: Ove riječi pojašnjavaju da se pravi život srca postiže samo kroz neprekidnu vezu s Uzvišenim Allahom i Njegovim spominjanjem.
sentences.translationEn: These words clarify that the true life of the heart is only achieved through constant connection with Allah Almighty and His remembrance.

sentences.arabic: فَالْمُؤْمِنُ الَّذِي يَلْهَجُ لِسَانُهُ بِالتَّسْبِيحِ وَالتَّحْمِيدِ يَشْعُرُ بِسَكِينَةٍ عَمِيقَةٍ لَا يَعْرِفُهَا الْغَافِلُونَ عَنْ طَاعَةِ اللهِ.
sentences.translation: Vjernik čiji jezik vlaži od tesbiha i tahmida osjeća duboki smiraj koji ne poznaju oni koji su nemarni prema pokornosti Allahu.
sentences.translationEn: A believer whose tongue is moist with glorification and praise feels a deep tranquility unknown to those heedless of Allah's obedience.

sentences.arabic: لِذَلِكَ، يُنْصَحُ كُلُّ مُسْلِمٍ بِأَنْ يَجْعَلَ لَهُ وِرْدًا يَوْمِيًّا مِنَ الْأَذْكَارِ لِيَحْفَظَ نَفْسَهُ مِنَ الْفِتَنِ.
sentences.translation: Zbog toga se svakom muslimanu savjetuje da odredi sebi dnevni vird (dio zikra) kako bi se sačuvao od iskušenja.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, every Muslim is advised to establish a daily portion of remembrance to protect themselves from trials.
